---
title: "What Have We Got"
author: "JW"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

```{r SetWorkingDirectory}
# Get working directory
wd = here::here()
pd = dirname(wd)
pjd = rstudioapi::getActiveProject()
```

```{r Helpers}
# Source helper functions
source(here::here("R/helpers.R"))
```

## Datensatzvorbereitung

```{r Fetch data}
# Datenbank
db = RSQLite::dbConnect(
  RSQLite::SQLite(), 
  here::here(pd, "01insight/output/basedata.db")
)
# Einlesen des Basisdatensatzes
basedata = RSQLite::dbReadTable(db, "basedata")
```

```{r}
ggplot2::ggplot(basedata, ggplot2::aes(x = bewert_d)) +
  ggplot2::geom_bar() +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    stat = "count",
    ggplot2::aes(label = ggplot2::after_stat(count)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    cex = 2.0
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ bsp_id) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1)))
```
